CustomField.formula: AND(Verified_Aadhaar_PAN_Number__c,Verified_Address__c, Verified_Applicant_Co_Applicant_Name__c, Verified_DOB_of_Applicant_s__c, Verified_Flat_Plot_Area__c, Verified_Received_Amount__c, Verified_Total_Flat_Consideration__c, Verified_Unit_Number_Block__c, Verified_Upcoming_Payments_Due_Date__c, Confirmed_Funding_Type__c, NOT(ISBLANK(Welcome_Call_Date__c)), IF(TEXT(Funding_Type__c) == 'Loan', AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Banker_s_Email__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Banker_s_Contact_Number__c)) ), TRUE))
CustomField.label: Welcome Call Checklist Done
